# Third-Party References

This folder is for source references that inform CurvyZero but are not necessarily part of the training runtime.

## Current Local Clones

- `curvytron-reference/` - local clone of `https://github.com/Curvytron/curvytron`, used for rule mining and possible browser/demo inspection. The clone itself is gitignored; provenance is tracked in `docs/sources/curvytron_reference.md`.
